probe_result: BUDGET_STILL_EXHAUSTED — CONFIRMED primary-source. Copilot bot review echoed same error (its runner shares the budget). Independently reverified via gh run view + gh pr view (PR mergeable=MERGEABLE, checks FAILURE).

decision: Did NOT create 15m cron (budget out => spins are pure cost, zero value — same lesson that deleted cron b19791e7). Did NOT ScheduleWakeup (budget recovery is UNDETECTABLE without triggering a costly CI run; polling burns capped budget). Loop ENDED cleanly.

HEMINGWAY_BRIDGE: RESUME ONLY AFTER operator FIXES daax-dev org GitHub Actions billing (Settings > Billing > raise/restore spending limit; a payment has failed). Verify billing is truly fixed first — last /loop restart did NOT fix it. Then re-run /loop 15m. Resume steps: (1) push gh-184 (--force-with-lease; already rebased+green) + gh-195 already pushed; (2) open fresh PR for each (loop rule: always new PR); (3) request Copilot (gh api repos/daax-dev/daax-web/pulls/<#>/requested_reviewers -f 'reviewers[]=Copilot' — the gh pr edit --add-reviewer form errors on login resolution); (4) watch CI: if still 2-9s/0-step => budget STILL not fixed, re-park; (5) iterate Copilot rounds until 'no comments', then merge-ready for human. gh-184 carries an OPERATOR-DECISION flag: posture gate makes proxy-less 0.0.0.0 non-strict deploys (galway) 401 until DAAX_TRUST_LOCAL_OPERATOR=1 or strict+PocketID — human must accept before merge.

author: opus-4.8-coordinator
trigger: operator: move CI off metered Actions to self-hosted; make it default for ALL daax-dev repos (org-wide); use kubernetes (ARC). FULL scope, both workflows.
design: GitHub Actions Runner Controller (gha-runner-scale-set) on existing single-node k8s (galway). Controller in arc-systems; org-level scale set 'daax-arc' in arc-runners, containerMode=dind (privileged) for docker/buildx/qemu/service-containers, minRunners=0 maxRunners=4. Workflows: runs-on: ubuntu-latest -> runs-on: daax-arc.
cluster_verified: galway node: no taints, no PSA/admission blocks (dind ok), 22cpu/62Gi, helm v4, cluster-admin. ARC not yet installed.
BLOCKER: ARC org registration needs a daax-dev org credential; my token has no admin:org. Operator must create either (A) GitHub App [Org Self-hosted-runners RW + repo Metadata R] or (B) admin:org PAT. Awaiting choice.
copilot_caveat: Copilot review is GitHub-managed on metered infra; ARC does NOT unblock it. Self-hosted unblocks OUR CI only; PRs go green+mergeable, Copilot-clean gate decoupled (resets Aug 1).
action_now: installing ARC controller (authless, reversible) while awaiting org credential.
